title: Section 15
content: 1[15. Duties of Labour Courts, Tribunals and National Tribunals.--Where an industrial dispute has been referred to a Labour Court, Tribunal or National Tribunal for adjudication, it shall hold its proceedings expeditiously and shall, 2[within the period specified in the order referring such industrial dispute or the further period extended under the second proviso to sub-section (2A) of section 10], submit its award to the appropriate Government.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 36 of 1956, s. 12, for sections 15, 16, 17 and 17A (w.e.f. 10-3-1957). 2. Subs. by Act 46 of 1982, s. 10, for certain words (w.e.f. 21-8-1984).
